title: Old image (Apollo 17, 1972) misrepresented as new

expected_findings.note: Earliest hit is 1972 NASA archive — image predates any 'new satellite footage' claim
EXIF stripped on re-upload (expected for repurposed images)
No C2PA manifest — image cannot be authenticated at the bit level

demo_narration: Tier 1 reverse-image search lands the demo's killer beat for the Romanian election narrative: 'this 2024 satellite image of a missile site' is actually a 1972 NASA photograph.
real_world_parallel: During the 2024 Romanian election cycle, multiple recycled images from prior conflicts circulated on TikTok and Telegram as new evidence.
